rcol 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Catalogue of Life shortcuts

Convenience functions that always target the latest extended COL release, pinned to a fixed key for the session.

col_match() col_match_verbose() col_match_checklist() col_dataset() col_dataset_metrics() col_usage() col_usage_search() col_search() col_suggest() col_classification() col_synonyms() col_vernacular() col_usage_metrics() col_tree() col_children()
Catalogue of Life shortcuts
col_key()
The pinned Catalogue of Life release key
col_refresh()
Re-pin the Catalogue of Life release

Name matching

Match scientific names against any dataset or COL release.

clb_match()
Match a scientific name against a ChecklistBank dataset
clb_match_verbose()
Match a name and return all candidate usages
clb_match_checklist()
Match a checklist of names in bulk

Catalogue of Life releases

clb_col_release()
Resolve a Catalogue of Life release
clb_col_releases()
List all Catalogue of Life releases

Parsers

clb_parsers()
List the available ChecklistBank parsers
clb_parse_name()
Parse scientific names
clb_parse()
Parse values with a ChecklistBank value parser

Datasets

clb_dataset_search()
Search datasets in ChecklistBank
clb_dataset()
Get dataset metadata
clb_dataset_metrics()
Dataset metrics

Name usages & taxa

clb_usage()
Get a name usage (taxon or synonym) by id
clb_usage_search() clb_search()
Full-text search of name usages
clb_suggest()
Autocomplete suggestions for name usages
clb_classification()
Taxonomic classification (lineage) of a taxon
clb_synonyms()
Synonyms of a taxon
clb_vernacular()
Vernacular (common) names
clb_usage_metrics()
Metrics for a taxon

Tree navigation

clb_tree()
Navigate the taxonomic tree
clb_children()
Direct children of a taxon

Configuration

clb_base_url()
The ChecklistBank API base URL

On this page

Developed by Markus Döring, Catalogue of Life.
